_comment: SSOT for thinkyou0714 repo inventory. Maintained alongside .github/CONVENTIONS.md. weekly-governance-audit reads active_count (threshold) and audit_only (repos audited but excluded from mutable-failure). Reconciled 2026-07-08: 21->28 (added agmsg, agmsg-kit, fugu, engineer-tenshoku-navi + recreated lab-os, skills-registry, lab-research).

repos.name: .github
repos.purpose: Org community-health + governance SSOT (CONVENTIONS, Renovate preset, audits)

repos.name: engineer-tenshoku-navi
repos.purpose: Engineer/IT-career affiliate static site (Astro, SEO/compliance-designed)

repos.name: lab-public
repos.purpose: Public-safe experiments and operational docs

repos.name: public-docs
repos.purpose: Public template implementation guides (Next.js + MDX, Vercel)

repos.purpose: Profile README

repos.name: zenn-content
repos.purpose: Zenn article sources (AI automation / Claude Code / n8n / Obsidian)

repos.purpose: Cross-vendor CLI-agent messaging (Bash+SQLite, no daemon); fork of fujibee/agmsg

repos.name: agmsg-kit
repos.purpose: Hardened reproducible installer + governance for fujibee/agmsg cross-agent messaging

repos.name: ccmux
repos.purpose: Claude Code Multiplexer (Zellij × git worktree × Obsidian)

repos.name: github-flow-kit

repos.purpose: Version-controlled ~/.claude personal dev kit

repos.name: codex-hub
repos.purpose: Codex provider routing & cost orchestration

repos.name: lab-apps-internal
repos.purpose: Internal apps (autoclaw, signal-core, labctl, ollama-proxy, sva)

repos.name: lab-inbox-bot
repos.purpose: Slack inbox bot (capture-to-Obsidian front-end)

repos.name: lab-infra
repos.purpose: Everything-monorepo shell + AI-agent operating discipline + public mirror (repo-local AGENTS forbids Codex changes; audited but excluded from mutable-failure)

repos.purpose: n8n workflow SSOT (491 workflow JSON)

repos.name: private-members

repos.name: lab-lms
